results.title: Azure RAG Best Practices
results.snippet: RAG systems should combine retrieval relevance and grounding checks for reliability.

results.title: Enterprise Retrieval Patterns
results.snippet: Hybrid retrieval and rerank can improve top-1 answer quality under noisy corpora.

results.title: Prompt Grounding Guide
results.snippet: Keep model outputs constrained to provided evidence and expose uncertainty when evidence is weak.
